$comment: GENERATED — do not edit. Generated by genesis_taxonomy from catalog 'fixture' v0.1.0.
title: updateComponents (fixture catalog v0.1.0)
description: A2UI v0.9-shaped updateComponents message for the fixture catalog. Always emit the WHOLE component tree; the client reconciles by component id. Exactly one component must have id "root".

surfaceId.description: Identifier of the surface being updated.

components.description: Flat adjacency list of components. Containers reference children by id.

oneOf.description: A leaf gauge readout exercising every prop kind. Cannot have children. AFFORDS CLIENT ACTIONS: the client may send an A2UI action message with sourceComponentId set to this component's id and one of these action names: "reset" — Return this gauge's reading to zero. Takes no context. "set" — Overwrite this gauge's reading with context.value (number, required). Last write wins.

id.description: Unique, stable component id. Becomes the reconciliation key: re-emit the same id to update a component in place.

scale.description: Full-scale reading the gauge tops out at.

enabled.description: Whether the gauge responds to actions.

align.description: Needle alignment within the gauge face.

reset.description: Return this gauge's reading to zero. Takes no context.

set.description: Overwrite this gauge's reading with context.value (number, required). Last write wins.

oneOf.description: A leaf component holding a single named string value. Cannot have children.

id.description: Unique, stable component id. Becomes the reconciliation key: re-emit the same id to update a component in place.

oneOf.description: A named container component. Holds an ordered list of child components referenced by id.

id.description: Unique, stable component id. Becomes the reconciliation key: re-emit the same id to update a component in place.

children.description: Ordered ids of child components. Every id must appear as a component in the same components list.
